title: calceolaria rugulosa
intro: Calceolaria rugulosa, also known as the 'Pink Pocket Flower' or 'Slipper Flower', is a species of flowering plant in the Calceolariaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation and relieving respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Calceolaria rugulosa typically involve infusions or teas made from the leaves, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and potential side effects.
